productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Black Ekwan Flip Flops
description: The adidas Ekwan flip flops transfer you into that leisure-bound stride with a simple thong design to hold your foot in place, and a quick-drying EVA upper when things get a little wet and wild.UpperQuick-drying EVA upper for dry comfortThong construction velvet straps and fabric toe separator to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and styleMidsolePadded footbed with brand name printed for lightweight, stylish comfortDie-cut EVA sole unit for all-day relaxation of the feetOutsoleTextured outsole for grip and stabilitySlipper careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
